The residence

Joséphine

A second-floor one-bedroom apartment of over 123 square metres gross with a private patio — unusually generous for its type at Green Coast, Palasë. The patio extends the living space outdoors for the long Riviera season, with the resort's plaza and Blue Flag beach moments away.

Location within the resort

Joséphine · Zona G8, Green Coast Resort

Explore the residence

Walk it, room by room

Tap any room on the plan to see its size.

Position within Green Coast

Where Joséphine sits

Joséphine holds the quiet north-western corner of the village, at the top of the quarter with greenery at its back. The hotel is a short walk east, the central plaza below it, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.

Quiet north-western corner, top of the quarter
